title: cephalanthera longifolia f. pilosa
intro: Cephalanthera longifolia f. pilosa, also known as the hairy white helleborine, is a rare species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cephalanthera longifolia f. pilosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its therapeutic effects.
